name: Order Fulfilment Management Ontology (OFM-ONT)
description: Models demand-side order fulfilment across two complementary layers: (1) warehouse/distribution — sales orders, stock allocation, storage cost accumulation, customer changes, margin tracking, dispatch, and fulfilment risk; (2) customer/commercial — SLA management, breach detection, landed cost build-up, margin analysis, complaint handling, customer satisfaction, and remediation. Bridges to LSC-ONT supply graph (8 operational bridges), VE-Series customer value engineering (9 bridges with VP-RRR alignment), and Foundation ontologies. Designed for food import/distribution but generalisable to any order-to-delivery fulfilment.

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Order-to-Delivery Traversal
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Walk the full fulfilment chain from sales order through allocation, dispatch, and delivery
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:SalesOrder -> hasOrderLine -> ofm:OrderLine -> hasAllocation -> ofm:StockAllocation -> allocatedToLine -> ofm:OrderLine -> hasDispatchLeg -> ofm:DispatchLeg -> hasDeliveryWindow -> ofm:DeliveryWindow
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Trace the complete fulfilment journey for a customer order from commitment to delivery

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Margin Waterfall
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Track margin erosion from booked margin through all erosion events to realised margin
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:OrderLine -> hasMarginImpact -> ofm:MarginImpact (ordered by erosionDate) -> cumulativeErosion chain
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Visualise the margin waterfall showing where value is lost between booking and invoicing

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Supply-Demand Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Cross-ontology join connecting inbound supply (LSC) to outbound demand (OFM)
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: lsc:Shipment <- allocatedFrom <- ofm:StockAllocation -> allocatedToLine -> ofm:OrderLine -> belongsToOrder -> ofm:SalesOrder
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Answer 'which customer orders depend on which inbound shipments?' — THE critical cross-ontology join

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Customer Change Impact
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Trace the impact of a customer amendment through affected order lines, margin erosion, and fulfilment risk
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:CustomerChange -> affectsOrderLine -> ofm:OrderLine -> hasMarginImpact -> ofm:MarginImpact; ofm:CustomerChange -> triggersMarginImpact -> ofm:MarginImpact; ofm:OrderLine -> hasFulfilmentRisk -> ofm:FulfilmentRisk
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Quantify the total cost and risk impact of a customer change request

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Storage Cost Accumulation
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Walk the storage event chain per allocation to calculate cumulative dwell cost
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:StockAllocation -> hasStorageEvent -> ofm:StorageEvent (ordered by eventDate) -> cumulativeCost running total
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Track daily storage cost accumulation per batch and identify high-dwell-cost allocations

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Supply Disruption to Demand Cascade
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Cross-ontology cascade from an LSC incident through affected allocations to customer order risk
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: lsc:Incident -> ofm:MarginImpact (via erosionFromIncident) -> ofm:OrderLine; ofm:StockAllocation (affected by incident) -> allocatedToLine -> ofm:OrderLine -> hasFulfilmentRisk -> ofm:FulfilmentRisk
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: When a supply-side incident occurs, immediately identify which customer orders are at risk

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Demand Pattern Recognition
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Identify recurring customer ordering behaviours and seasonal trends
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:DemandPattern -> correlatesWithSupplyPattern -> lsc:PredictivePattern; ofm:DemandPattern -> customer ordering history -> seasonal/behavioural trends
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Forecast demand based on historical patterns, seasonal cycles, and customer-specific behaviours

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Capacity Planning
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Net warehouse capacity from inbound arrivals (LSC) and outbound dispatches (OFM)
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:CapacityForecast -> considersInboundFrom -> lsc:SupplyChain; ofm:CapacityForecast -> outbound dispatches -> ofm:DispatchLeg
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Plan warehouse capacity by netting inbound arrivals against outbound dispatches over a rolling horizon

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Fulfilment Risk Heat Map
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Aggregate fulfilment risks across all orders for a risk dashboard
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:SalesOrder -> hasOrderLine -> ofm:OrderLine -> hasFulfilmentRisk -> ofm:FulfilmentRisk (aggregated by riskType, impact)
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Build a real-time fulfilment risk heat map showing order-level and aggregate risk exposure

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Order-to-Shipment Tracking
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Cross-ontology join from commercial order to physical shipment position
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Real-time order position tracking — where is my shipment right now?

oaa:joinPatterns.name: SLA Compliance Dashboard
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Join SLA definitions to milestones and breach records for compliance visibility
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:ServiceLevelAgreement -> slaMonitorsMilestone -> ofm:OrderMilestone; ofm:ServiceLevelAgreement -> hasBreach -> ofm:SLABreach -> breachTriggeredByIncident -> lsc:Incident
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: SLA health view — which SLAs are on track, at risk, or breached, and what incidents caused breaches?

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Automated Assessment Flow
oaa:joinPatterns.description: End-to-end predictive assessment from early warning to proactive customer notification
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: lsc:PredictivePattern -> lsc:Hypothesis -> lsc:Scenario -> ofm:SLABreach (predicted) -> breachTriggersRemediation -> ofm:RemediationAction -> remediationNotifiesCustomer -> ofm:CustomerNotification
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Predictive-to-notification chain — early warning signals drive proactive customer communication

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Profit Optimisation Chain
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Full revenue-to-PMF validation chain through landed cost and margin analysis
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:SalesOrder -> hasLandedCost -> ofm:LandedCost -> costImpactedBy -> lsc:ImpactAssessment; ofm:LandedCost -> landedCostFeedsMargin -> ofm:MarginAnalysis -> marginValidatesPMF -> pmf:ProductMarketFit
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Revenue to product-market fit validation — does this corridor sustain profitable margins?

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Complaint-to-Prevention Loop
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Closed-loop learning from customer complaint through root cause to systemic prevention
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:ComplaintCase -> complaintRootCauseIncident -> lsc:Incident -> occursAtNode -> lsc:ChainNode -> hasBottleneck -> lsc:Bottleneck -> mitigates -> lsc:RiskMitigation <- remediationInformsMitigation <- ofm:RemediationAction
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Every complaint drives systemic improvement — trace from customer issue to operational fix

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Customer Role Experience
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Role-specific fulfilment experience view combining orders, satisfaction, and KPI metrics
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: crt:CustomerRole <- orderPlacedByRole <- ofm:SalesOrder -> hasSatisfaction -> ofm:CustomerSatisfaction -> satisfactionFeedsKPI -> kpi:Metric
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Role-specific fulfilment KPIs — how is each customer segment experiencing our service?

oaa:joinPatterns.name: VP-RRR Through Fulfilment
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Value proposition alignment via fulfilment data — complaints reveal problems (risks), remediation maps to solutions (requirements), satisfaction validates benefits (results)
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ofm:ComplaintCase -> complaintRevealsVPProblem -> vp:Problem [-> rrr:Risk]; ofm:RemediationAction -> remediationMapsToVPSolution -> vp:Solution [-> rrr:Requirement]; ofm:CustomerSatisfaction -> satisfactionValidatesBenefit -> vp:Benefit [-> rrr:Result]
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: VP-RRR alignment via fulfilment — does our service delivery validate our value proposition?

entities.name: SalesOrder
entities.description: A customer order commitment representing demand for goods. The top-level container for the fulfilment graph. Tracks order status from draft through allocation, dispatch, delivery, and invoicing. Carries booked and realised margin for P&L visibility. Equivalent to PurchaseOrder in the customer/commercial layer — serves as the hub entity connecting both warehouse/distribution and customer-facing views.

oaa:properties.name: orderId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this sales order

oaa:properties.name: customerName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the customer placing the order

oaa:properties.name: orderStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of the order

oaa:properties.name: totalOrderValue
oaa:properties.description: Total monetary value of the order (e.g. GBP 24,500)

oaa:properties.name: bookedMargin
oaa:properties.description: Expected margin at time of order confirmation (e.g. GBP 4,200 / 17.1%)

oaa:properties.name: realisedMargin
oaa:properties.description: Actual margin after all erosion events (e.g. GBP 2,800 / 11.4%)

oaa:properties.name: marginStatus
oaa:properties.description: RAG status of margin health — Green (>target), Amber (within tolerance), Red (below floor)

oaa:properties.name: paymentTerms
oaa:properties.description: Payment terms (e.g. Net 30, COD, 60 days EOM)

entities.name: OrderLine
entities.description: An individual product line within a sales order. Each line specifies a product, quantity, price, and commodity class. Lines are independently allocatable and trackable through the fulfilment pipeline.

oaa:properties.name: orderLineId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this order line

oaa:properties.name: productDescription
oaa:properties.description: Description of the product (e.g. Wagyu ribeye 300-day grain-fed)

oaa:properties.name: quantity
oaa:properties.description: Order quantity with unit (e.g. 500 kg, 20 cases)

oaa:properties.name: committedShelfLife
oaa:properties.description: Minimum shelf life guaranteed to customer at delivery (e.g. 21 days)

oaa:properties.name: requestedDeliveryDate
oaa:properties.description: Line-level requested delivery date (may differ from order header)

oaa:properties.name: lineStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current fulfilment status of this line

oaa:properties.name: corridorSource
oaa:properties.description: Supply corridor that sources this product (links to LSC-ONT corridor)

entities.name: StockAllocation
entities.description: Links an inbound shipment batch (LSC-ONT supply side) to an order line (OFM-ONT demand side). THE supply-demand bridge entity. Tracks allocation status, shelf life at allocation time, and storage location. Multiple allocations can fulfil a single order line (partial allocation) and a single shipment can serve multiple order lines.

oaa:properties.name: allocatedQuantity
oaa:properties.description: Quantity allocated from this batch (e.g. 200 kg)

oaa:properties.name: batchRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to landed batch / LSC shipment identifier

oaa:properties.name: shelfLifeAtAllocation
oaa:properties.description: Remaining shelf life at the time of allocation (e.g. 42 days)

oaa:properties.name: storageLocation
oaa:properties.description: Warehouse location where allocated stock is held (e.g. Bay 14, Rack C)

oaa:properties.name: temperatureZone
oaa:properties.description: Temperature zone of the storage location

entities.name: StorageEvent
entities.description: A daily or periodic storage cost accumulation record for an allocated batch. Tracks pallet count, daily rate, temperature multiplier, and cumulative cost. The storage event chain shows how dwell cost erodes margin over time.

oaa:properties.name: storageEventId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this storage event

oaa:properties.name: palletsStored
oaa:properties.description: Number of pallets in storage on this date

oaa:properties.name: dailyRate
oaa:properties.description: Base daily rate per pallet (e.g. GBP 3.50)

oaa:properties.name: temperatureMultiplier
oaa:properties.description: Multiplier for temperature zone (e.g. 1.0 ambient, 1.5 chilled, 2.2 frozen)

oaa:properties.name: dailyCost
oaa:properties.description: Calculated daily storage cost (pallets x dailyRate x temperatureMultiplier)

oaa:properties.name: cumulativeCost
oaa:properties.description: Running total of storage cost for this allocation

oaa:properties.name: shelfLifeRemaining
oaa:properties.description: Remaining shelf life at this point (e.g. 35 days)

oaa:properties.name: capacityUtilisation
oaa:properties.description: Warehouse capacity utilisation percentage at time of event (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: dwellDays
oaa:properties.description: Number of days this batch has been in storage

entities.name: DeliveryWindow
entities.description: A committed dispatch and delivery time slot for an order line. Captures scheduled vs actual dates, delivery slot preferences, vehicle requirements, and access constraints. Failed windows trigger rescheduling and margin impact.

oaa:properties.name: windowId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this delivery window

oaa:properties.name: windowStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current status of this delivery window

oaa:properties.name: vehicleRequirements
oaa:properties.description: Vehicle specifications needed (e.g. 7.5t rigid, tail-lift, dual-compartment)

oaa:properties.name: accessConstraints
oaa:properties.description: Site access restrictions (e.g. no artics, loading bay 3 only, requires booking-in)

entities.name: DispatchLeg
entities.description: An outbound transport movement from warehouse to customer. Tracks carrier, vehicle type, temperature class, transit time, cost, and delivery outcome. Consolidated dispatches serve multiple orders on a single vehicle.

oaa:properties.name: dispatchLegId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this dispatch leg

oaa:properties.name: carrierName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the haulier or delivery carrier

oaa:properties.name: routeDescription
oaa:properties.description: Route description (e.g. Tilbury DC -> M25 -> Croydon depot)

oaa:properties.name: dispatchCost
oaa:properties.description: Cost of this dispatch leg (e.g. GBP 285)

oaa:properties.name: isConsolidated
oaa:properties.description: True if this dispatch carries multiple orders on one vehicle

oaa:properties.name: consolidatedOrderCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of orders consolidated on this dispatch

entities.name: CustomerChange
entities.description: An amendment, reschedule, reduction, or cancellation initiated by the customer after order confirmation. Customer changes are a major source of margin erosion and fulfilment risk. Tracks the type of change, timing relative to dispatch, direct and indirect costs, and recovery.

oaa:properties.name: changeId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this customer change

oaa:properties.name: changeReason
oaa:properties.description: Customer's stated reason for the change

oaa:properties.name: requestedBy
oaa:properties.description: Name or role of the person requesting the change

oaa:properties.name: directCost
oaa:properties.description: Immediate cost of the change (e.g. wasted stock, re-pick cost)

oaa:properties.name: indirectCost
oaa:properties.description: Indirect cost (e.g. additional storage, re-allocation labour)

oaa:properties.name: cascadeRisk
oaa:properties.description: Description of downstream cascade risks from this change

oaa:properties.name: changeWindow
oaa:properties.description: How far before scheduled dispatch the change was made (e.g. 48 hours, same day)

oaa:properties.name: recoveredAmount
oaa:properties.description: Amount recovered from re-allocation or cancellation charges

oaa:properties.name: recoveryMethod
oaa:properties.description: How costs were recovered (e.g. re-allocated to another order, cancellation charge, credit note offset)

entities.name: MarginImpact
entities.description: A running margin calculation event that records an erosion (or recovery) step between booked margin and realised margin. The chain of MarginImpact events forms the margin waterfall — each event records the source of erosion, the amount, and the resulting margin position.

oaa:properties.name: marginImpactId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this margin impact event

oaa:properties.name: erosionSource
oaa:properties.description: Classification of what caused this margin erosion

oaa:properties.name: erosionAmount
oaa:properties.description: Monetary amount of this erosion event (e.g. GBP 320)

oaa:properties.name: cumulativeErosion
oaa:properties.description: Running total of all erosion for this order line

oaa:properties.name: marginBeforeEvent
oaa:properties.description: Margin position before this erosion event

oaa:properties.name: marginAfterEvent
oaa:properties.description: Margin position after this erosion event

oaa:properties.name: marginPercentageRemaining
oaa:properties.description: Margin as percentage of line value remaining after this event (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Free-text description of the erosion event

entities.name: FulfilmentRisk
entities.description: A risk assessment attached to an order or order line. Captures the probability, impact, and score of fulfilment risks such as late delivery, stock shortage, quality issues, or carrier failure. Enables heat-map visualisation across the order book.

oaa:properties.name: riskId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this fulfilment risk

oaa:properties.name: probability
oaa:properties.description: Probability of this risk materialising (0.0 to 1.0)

oaa:properties.name: impact
oaa:properties.description: Impact severity if the risk materialises

oaa:properties.name: riskScore
oaa:properties.description: Composite risk score (probability x impact weight)

oaa:properties.name: riskStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of this risk

oaa:properties.name: detectedDate
oaa:properties.description: Date the risk was first detected

oaa:properties.name: resolvedDate
oaa:properties.description: Date the risk was resolved or closed

entities.name: DemandPattern
entities.description: A recurring customer ordering behaviour or demand trend identified from historical order data. Demand patterns enable proactive stock positioning, allocation planning, and capacity forecasting. Correlates with LSC-ONT PredictivePattern for supply-demand alignment.

oaa:properties.name: patternId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this demand pattern

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of the pattern and its characteristics

oaa:properties.name: observedFrequency
oaa:properties.description: How often this pattern recurs (e.g. annually Dec, weekly Mon/Tue, quarterly)

oaa:properties.name: historicalOccurrences
oaa:properties.description: Number of times this pattern has been observed

oaa:properties.name: typicalImpact
oaa:properties.description: What typically happens when this pattern activates (e.g. +30% wagyu demand)

oaa:properties.name: leadIndicators
oaa:properties.description: Early-warning signals that this pattern is activating

oaa:properties.name: recommendedAction
oaa:properties.description: Pre-emptive action when pattern is detected (e.g. increase AU-UK allocation by 25%)

entities.name: CapacityForecast
entities.description: A warehouse capacity planning forecast. Nets inbound arrivals (from LSC supply chains) against outbound dispatches to project capacity utilisation over a rolling horizon. Triggers overflow risk alerts when projected utilisation exceeds thresholds.

oaa:properties.name: forecastId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this capacity forecast

oaa:properties.name: forecastHorizonDays
oaa:properties.description: Number of days this forecast covers (e.g. 7, 14, 30)

oaa:properties.name: projectedPeakUtilisation
oaa:properties.description: Highest projected utilisation within the forecast horizon

oaa:properties.name: inboundArrivalsPlanned
oaa:properties.description: Number of inbound shipments expected within horizon

oaa:properties.name: outboundDispatchesPlanned
oaa:properties.description: Number of outbound dispatches planned within horizon

oaa:properties.name: netCapacityChange
oaa:properties.description: Net change in stored pallets (inbound minus outbound)

oaa:properties.name: overflowRisk
oaa:properties.description: Description of overflow risk if capacity is exceeded

oaa:properties.name: recommendedAction
oaa:properties.description: Recommended action to manage capacity (e.g. expedite dispatches, defer inbound)

entities.name: ServiceLevelAgreement
entities.description: A contractual service level agreement defining performance targets for order fulfilment. Covers delivery time, temperature compliance, order accuracy, response time, damage rates, and documentation accuracy. SLAs are monitored via OrderMilestones and breaches are recorded as SLABreach entities.

oaa:properties.name: slaType
oaa:properties.description: Classification of what the SLA measures

oaa:properties.name: unit
oaa:properties.description: Unit of measure — days, percent, hours, celsius

entities.name: OrderMilestone
entities.description: A tracking milestone in the order fulfilment lifecycle. Each milestone has a planned and actual date, enabling SLA compliance monitoring. Milestones map to physical locations via the milestoneAtNode bridge to LSC-ONT ChainNode. Variance triggers SLA breach detection.

oaa:properties.name: milestoneType
oaa:properties.description: Classification of this milestone in the order lifecycle

entities.name: CustomerNotification
entities.description: A milestone-triggered or event-triggered communication sent to the customer. Covers order confirmations, dispatch notices, tracking updates, delay alerts, SLA breach notices, complaint acknowledgements, remediation offers, and satisfaction surveys. Tracks send/deliver/read timestamps.

entities.name: LandedCost
entities.description: A cost line item contributing to the full landed cost of an order. Covers 14 cost categories including product cost, freight, insurance, customs duty, import tariff, warehousing, last mile, documentation, inspection, demurrage, detention, currency hedging, agent fees, and port handling. Multiple LandedCost entries per order build up the total cost for margin analysis.

oaa:properties.name: perUnit
oaa:properties.description: Unit basis — per container, per kg, per order

oaa:properties.name: allocatedToOrder
oaa:properties.description: Order reference this cost is allocated to

entities.name: MarginAnalysis
entities.description: A profitability analysis for an order or corridor. Calculates gross margin from total revenue minus total landed cost. Tracks target margin, variance, and profitability status. Links to PMF-ONT for market fit validation — sustained margins validate product-market fit.

entities.name: SLABreach
entities.description: A record of an SLA violation. Created when an OrderMilestone variance exceeds the SLA target. Links to LSC-ONT Incident and Bottleneck to trace the operational root cause. SLA breaches feed KPI dashboards and trigger remediation actions and customer notifications.

oaa:properties.name: breachType
oaa:properties.description: Mirrors SLA slaType enum — what type of SLA was breached

oaa:properties.name: isNotified
oaa:properties.description: Whether customer was notified of breach

entities.name: ComplaintCase
entities.description: A customer complaint record tracking the lifecycle from raising through investigation, remediation, and resolution. Links to LSC-ONT Incident for root cause tracing and to VP-ONT Problem for value proposition alignment (VP-RRR: complaints reveal problems which are risks to the customer).

entities.name: CustomerSatisfaction
entities.description: A customer satisfaction survey record capturing NPS/CSAT scores, verbatim feedback, sentiment analysis, and response themes. Links to VP-ONT Benefit for value proposition validation (VP-RRR: satisfaction validates benefits which are measurable results). Feeds KPI dashboards via satisfactionFeedsKPI bridge.

oaa:properties.name: score
oaa:properties.description: Raw score (0-10 for NPS, 1-5 for CSAT)

oaa:properties.name: responseRate
oaa:properties.description: Response rate for this survey batch (0-100)

entities.name: RemediationAction
entities.description: A resolution action taken in response to an SLA breach or customer complaint. Covers credit notes, replacements, refunds, priority reshipments, SLA waivers, discounts, apologies, process changes, and supplier claims. Links to VP-ONT Solution for value proposition alignment (VP-RRR: remediation actions are solutions which map to requirements). Links to LSC-ONT RiskMitigation to drive systemic improvements.

oaa:properties.name: approvedBy
oaa:properties.description: Approver name/role (required if cost exceeds threshold)

oaa:properties.name: preventsFutureOccurrence
oaa:properties.description: Whether this is a systemic fix preventing recurrence

relationships.name: Has Order Line
relationships.description: Sales order contains this order line

relationships.name: Belongs To Order
relationships.description: Order line belongs to this sales order (inverse of hasOrderLine)

relationships.name: Has Allocation
relationships.description: Order line has this stock allocation

relationships.name: Allocated To Line
relationships.description: Stock allocation is assigned to this order line (inverse of hasAllocation)

relationships.name: Allocated From
relationships.description: Stock allocation draws from this inbound shipment — THE supply-demand bridge relationship

relationships.name: Has Storage Event
relationships.description: Stock allocation has this storage cost accumulation event

relationships.name: Has Delivery Window
relationships.description: Order line has this committed delivery window

relationships.name: Has Dispatch Leg
relationships.description: Order line is fulfilled by this outbound dispatch leg

relationships.name: Has Margin Impact
relationships.description: Order line has this margin erosion event

relationships.name: Has Fulfilment Risk
relationships.description: Order line has this fulfilment risk assessment

relationships.name: Order Has Fulfilment Risk
relationships.description: Sales order has this order-level fulfilment risk assessment

relationships.name: Has Customer Change
relationships.description: Sales order has this customer-initiated change

relationships.name: Affects Order Line
relationships.description: Customer change affects these order lines

relationships.name: Triggers Margin Impact
relationships.description: Customer change triggers this margin erosion event

relationships.name: Erosion From Incident
relationships.description: Margin erosion was caused by this LSC-ONT supply-side incident

relationships.name: Erosion From Bottleneck
relationships.description: Margin erosion was caused by this LSC-ONT supply-side bottleneck

relationships.name: Informed By LSC Risk
relationships.description: Fulfilment risk is informed by this LSC-ONT risk assessment

relationships.name: Correlates With Supply Pattern
relationships.description: Demand pattern correlates with this LSC-ONT predictive supply pattern

relationships.name: Considers Inbound From
relationships.description: Capacity forecast considers inbound arrivals from these LSC-ONT supply chains

relationships.name: Managed By Role
relationships.description: Sales order is managed by this RRR-ONT functional role (e.g. Account Manager, Sales Director)

relationships.name: Operated By Carrier
relationships.description: Dispatch leg is operated by this carrier organisation

relationships.name: Maps To Process
relationships.description: Fulfilment workflow maps to a PE-ONT process definition

relationships.name: Tracked By KPI
relationships.description: Sales order performance tracked by this KPI-ONT metric

relationships.name: Dispatch Uses Window
relationships.description: Dispatch leg uses this delivery window for scheduling

relationships.name: Storage Erodes Margin
relationships.description: Storage event contributes to this margin impact (storage cost accumulation eroding margin)

relationships.name: Change Triggers Risk
relationships.description: Customer change creates or increases this fulfilment risk

relationships.name: Demand Pattern Affects Capacity
relationships.description: Demand pattern influences this capacity forecast

relationships.name: Allocation Fulfils Line
relationships.description: Stock allocation contributes to fulfilling this order line (many allocations can partially fulfil one line)

relationships.name: Risk Informed By Pattern
relationships.description: Fulfilment risk assessment is informed by this demand pattern

relationships.name: Customer Ordered By
relationships.description: Sales order placed by this customer organisation

relationships.name: Capacity Forecast For Warehouse
relationships.description: Capacity forecast is for this warehouse organisation

relationships.name: Dispatch Consolidates With
relationships.description: Dispatch leg is consolidated with other dispatch legs on the same vehicle

relationships.name: Has SLA
relationships.description: Sales order is governed by this service level agreement

relationships.name: Has Milestone
relationships.description: Sales order has this tracking milestone in its fulfilment lifecycle

relationships.name: Has Notification
relationships.description: Sales order has this customer notification

relationships.name: Has Landed Cost
relationships.description: Sales order has this landed cost line item contributing to the total cost build-up

relationships.name: Has Margin Analysis
relationships.description: Sales order has this margin/profitability analysis

relationships.name: Has Breach
relationships.description: Service level agreement has this breach record

relationships.name: Has Complaint
relationships.description: Sales order has this customer complaint case

relationships.name: Has Satisfaction
relationships.description: Sales order has this customer satisfaction survey record

relationships.name: SLA Monitors Milestone
relationships.description: Service level agreement monitors compliance via this order milestone

relationships.name: Breach Triggers Remediation
relationships.description: SLA breach triggers this remediation action

relationships.name: Complaint Leads To Remediation
relationships.description: Customer complaint leads to this remediation action

relationships.name: Remediation Notifies Customer
relationships.description: Remediation action triggers this customer notification (e.g. remediation offer, credit note notice)

relationships.name: Landed Cost Feeds Margin
relationships.description: Landed cost entries feed into margin analysis calculation (totalLandedCost = sum of LandedCost amounts)

relationships.name: Complaint Affects Satisfaction
relationships.description: Customer complaint affects this satisfaction survey outcome

relationships.name: Satisfaction Informs Remediation
relationships.description: Customer satisfaction feedback informs remediation strategy (e.g. low NPS triggers proactive remediation)

relationships.name: Fulfilled By Shipment
relationships.description: Sales order is physically fulfilled by this LSC-ONT shipment consignment. Links the commercial order to the physical logistics.

relationships.name: Order Uses Chain
relationships.description: Sales order travels via this LSC-ONT supply chain corridor (e.g. AU-UK meat corridor)

relationships.name: Milestone At Node
relationships.description: Order milestone occurred at this physical LSC-ONT chain node (e.g. port, warehouse, customs point)

relationships.name: Breach Triggered By Incident
relationships.description: SLA breach was caused by this LSC-ONT supply-side incident (e.g. vessel delay, port congestion)

relationships.name: Breach Caused By Bottleneck
relationships.description: SLA breach was caused by this systemic LSC-ONT bottleneck (e.g. recurring port congestion)

relationships.name: Cost Impacted By
relationships.description: Landed cost was impacted by this LSC-ONT disruption impact assessment (e.g. incident costs rolling into landed cost)

relationships.name: Complaint Root Cause Incident
relationships.description: Customer complaint traces to this LSC-ONT logistics incident as the operational root cause

relationships.name: Remediation Informs Mitigation
relationships.description: Customer remediation action drives this systemic LSC-ONT risk mitigation (closing the loop from complaint to prevention)

relationships.name: Complaint Reveals VP Problem
relationships.description: Customer complaint reveals a value proposition problem — VP-RRR alignment: complaints are problems which map to risks for the customer

relationships.name: Remediation Maps To VP Solution
relationships.description: Remediation action maps to a value proposition solution — VP-RRR alignment: remediation actions are solutions which map to requirements to build

relationships.name: Satisfaction Validates Benefit
relationships.description: Customer satisfaction validates a value proposition benefit — VP-RRR alignment: satisfaction confirms benefits which are measurable results

relationships.name: Margin Validates PMF
relationships.description: Sustained margin profitability validates product-market fit — if margins are healthy over time, the product/corridor has market fit

relationships.name: Satisfaction Feeds KPI
relationships.description: Customer satisfaction score feeds KPI dashboard metrics (e.g. NPS score, CSAT average)

relationships.name: Breach Feeds KPI
relationships.description: SLA breach rate feeds KPI dashboard metrics (e.g. breach count, breach rate percentage)

relationships.name: Order Placed By Role
relationships.description: Sales order was placed by a customer in this CRT-ONT customer role (e.g. B2B Buyer, B2C Consumer)

relationships.name: Complaint Owned By Role
relationships.description: Complaint case is owned and accountable to this RRR-ONT functional role for resolution

relationships.name: Breach Accountable Role
relationships.description: SLA breach accountability is assigned to this RRR-ONT functional role

businessRules.name: AllocationBeforeDispatch
businessRules.condition: IF an OrderLine.lineStatus transitions to InDispatch
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least one StockAllocation with allocationStatus = Confirmed

businessRules.name: MarginWaterfallIntegrity
businessRules.condition: IF a SalesOrder has realisedMargin defined
businessRules.action: THEN the sum of all MarginImpact.erosionAmount for all OrderLines MUST equal (bookedMargin - realisedMargin) within rounding tolerance

businessRules.name: AllocationMustReferenceLSCShipment
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have an allocatedFrom relationship referencing a valid lsc:Shipment

businessRules.name: ShelfLifeAtDispatch
businessRules.condition: IF an OrderLine enters InDispatch status AND has a committedShelfLife defined
businessRules.action: THEN the shelfLifeRemaining on the associated StockAllocation's latest StorageEvent MUST exceed committedShelfLife

businessRules.name: LateChangeEscalation
businessRules.condition: IF a CustomerChange.changeWindow is less than 24 hours before scheduled dispatch
businessRules.action: THEN the change MUST trigger L2 escalation and a FulfilmentRisk of impact >= High MUST be created

businessRules.name: CapacityRedThreshold
businessRules.action: THEN capacityStatus MUST be Red AND a FulfilmentRisk of type StorageOverflow MUST be created

businessRules.name: MarginRedThreshold
businessRules.action: THEN the parent SalesOrder.marginStatus MUST be set to Red AND a FulfilmentRisk SHOULD be raised

businessRules.name: DispatchTemperatureMatch
businessRules.condition: IF a DispatchLeg is assigned to an OrderLine with commodityClass = Frozen
businessRules.action: THEN DispatchLeg.temperatureClass MUST be Frozen or DualCompartment (not Chilled or Ambient)

businessRules.name: StorageEventDailyCostCalculation
businessRules.action: THEN dailyCost MUST equal palletsStored x dailyRate x temperatureMultiplier AND cumulativeCost MUST equal sum of all prior dailyCost values for this allocation

businessRules.name: DeliveryWindowSequence
businessRules.action: THEN scheduledDeliveryDate MUST be >= scheduledDispatchDate AND actualDeliveryDate (if set) MUST be >= actualDispatchDate

businessRules.name: CancelledOrderNoDispatch
businessRules.action: THEN no OrderLine within this order MUST have lineStatus = InDispatch or Delivered

businessRules.name: ConsolidationDispatchCount
businessRules.action: THEN consolidatedOrderCount MUST be >= 2

businessRules.name: FailedDeliveryRequiresReschedule
businessRules.action: THEN a new DeliveryWindow with windowStatus = Rescheduled SHOULD be created AND a MarginImpact of type DispatchPremium SHOULD be recorded

businessRules.name: HighDwellAlert
businessRules.condition: IF a StorageEvent.dwellDays > 14 AND temperatureZone IN [Chilled, Frozen]
businessRules.action: THEN a FulfilmentRisk of type ShortShelfLife SHOULD be raised AND the allocation SHOULD be reviewed for priority dispatch

businessRules.name: DemandPatternReliability
businessRules.action: THEN the pattern SHOULD NOT be used for automated allocation or capacity planning without human review

businessRules.name: QuantityReductionRecovery
businessRules.condition: IF a CustomerChange.changeType = QuantityReduction AND directCost > 0
businessRules.action: THEN recoveredAmount and recoveryMethod SHOULD be populated within 5 business days

businessRules.name: FulfilmentRiskProbabilityBound
businessRules.action: THEN probability MUST be between 0.0 and 1.0

businessRules.name: OrderMustHaveLines
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least one OrderLine via hasOrderLine relationship

businessRules.name: AllocationTemperatureZoneMatch
businessRules.condition: IF a StockAllocation references an OrderLine with commodityClass = Frozen
businessRules.action: THEN StockAllocation.temperatureZone MUST be Frozen

businessRules.name: RefusedDeliveryMarginImpact
businessRules.action: THEN a MarginImpact event MUST be created for the associated OrderLine with erosionSource appropriate to the refusal reason

businessRules.name: OrderMustHaveShipment
businessRules.condition: IF a SalesOrder.orderStatus IN [InDispatch, Delivered, Invoiced]
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least 1 fulfilledByShipment reference to a valid lsc:Shipment

businessRules.name: SLABreachDetection
businessRules.condition: IF an OrderMilestone.actualDate exceeds plannedDate by more than the associated SLA targetValue
businessRules.action: THEN an SLABreach entity MUST be created with severity based on deviation percentage and breachType matching the SLA slaType

businessRules.name: BreachRequiresNotification
businessRules.action: THEN a CustomerNotification of type SLABreachNotice MUST be sent within 4 hours AND SLABreach.isNotified MUST be set to true

businessRules.name: ComplaintRequiresOwner
businessRules.action: THEN complaintOwnedByRole MUST reference a valid pf:FunctionalRole — every complaint must have an accountable owner

businessRules.name: RemediationApproval
businessRules.condition: IF a RemediationAction.cost exceeds the currency-specific threshold (e.g. GBP 500, AUD 1000)
businessRules.action: THEN approvedBy MUST be populated with the approving role or individual

businessRules.name: MarginCalculation
businessRules.action: THEN grossMargin MUST equal totalRevenue - totalLandedCost AND grossMarginPercent MUST equal grossMargin / totalRevenue * 100

businessRules.name: LandedCostCompleteness
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least 3 LandedCost entries covering ProductCost + Freight + one of Insurance/CustomsDuty/ImportTariff

businessRules.name: VPRRRAlignmentEnforcement
businessRules.condition: IF a ComplaintCase links to vp:Problem via complaintRevealsVPProblem
businessRules.action: THEN the referenced vp:Problem SHOULD also have rrr:Risk alignment (ensuring the VP-RRR convention: Problem → Risk is maintained)

changeControl.author: PF-Core
changes: Initial release - 11 entities, 32 relationships, 20 business rules, 9 join patterns
Demand-side complement to LSC-ONT (supply side)
StockAllocation as THE supply-demand bridge entity (LSC Shipment -> OFM OrderLine)
Margin waterfall tracking from booked to realised margin via MarginImpact chain
Storage cost accumulation via StorageEvent with daily rate x temperature multiplier
Customer change management with direct/indirect cost tracking and recovery
Fulfilment risk heat map with probability x impact scoring
Demand pattern recognition correlated with LSC PredictivePattern
Warehouse capacity planning netting inbound (LSC) against outbound dispatches
Cross-ontology bridges to LSC-ONT (6 relationships), PE-ONT, ORG-ONT, RRR-ONT, KPI-ONT
Designed for food import/distribution (AU/NZ -> UK meat) but generalisable to any warehouse-to-customer fulfilment

changeControl.author: PF-Core
changes: F41.2 + F41.3: Customer/commercial layer added — 9 new entities alongside existing 11 warehouse entities
New entities: ServiceLevelAgreement, OrderMilestone, CustomerNotification, LandedCost, MarginAnalysis, SLABreach, ComplaintCase, CustomerSatisfaction, RemediationAction
SalesOrder marked rdfs:sameAs ofm:PurchaseOrder — hub entity connects both layers
15 internal relationships connecting new entities to SalesOrder hub

8 LSC-ONT bridge relationships (F41.2): fulfilledByShipment, orderUsesChain, milestoneAtNode, breachTriggeredByIncident, breachCausedByBottleneck, costImpactedBy, complaintRootCauseIncident, remediationInformsMitigation

9 VE-Series bridge relationships (F41.3): complaintRevealsVPProblem, remediationMapsToVPSolution, satisfactionValidatesBenefit, marginValidatesPMF, satisfactionFeedsKPI, breachFeedsKPI, orderPlacedByRole, complaintOwnedByRole, breachAccountableRole
VP-RRR alignment on 3 bridges: ComplaintCase→Problem (Risk), RemediationAction→Solution (Requirement), CustomerSatisfaction→Benefit (Result)
8 new business rules (BR-OFM-021 to BR-OFM-028) for bridge validation and SLA enforcement
7 new join patterns (JP-OFM-010 to JP-OFM-016) for cross-ontology traversals
New imports: VP-ONT v1.2.3, PMF-ONT v2.0.0, CRT-ONT v1.0.0, VSOM-ONT v1.0.0
Updated LSC-ONT usedEntities: +ChainNode, +ImpactAssessment, +RiskMitigation
Updated KPI-ONT usedEntities: +kpi:Metric
Totals: 20 entities, 64 relationships, 28 business rules, 16 join patterns

competencyQuestions.question: What is the current status of a sales order, what are its order lines, and what is the margin position (booked vs realised)?
Which inbound LSC shipments have been allocated to which customer order lines, and what is the allocation status?
What is the margin waterfall for a given order line, showing each erosion event from booked margin to realised margin?
How much has storage cost accumulated for a given allocation, and what is the shelf life remaining?
What customer changes have been requested for this order, which lines are affected, and what is the cost impact?
What delivery windows are scheduled, have any failed, and what is the on-time delivery rate?
Which dispatch legs are consolidated, what carriers are used, and what is the delivery outcome distribution?
What are the highest fulfilment risks across the order book, broken down by risk type and impact?
If an LSC supply-side incident occurs, which customer orders are immediately at risk?
What recurring demand patterns have been identified, and how do they correlate with supply-side patterns from LSC-ONT?
What is the current warehouse capacity utilisation, and what is the projected peak over the next 14 days?
Which orders have margin status Red, and what were the primary erosion sources?
What is the shelf life position across all allocations, and which are at risk of breaching committed shelf life at dispatch?
How many customer changes occurred in the last 30 days, what was the total cost, and how much was recovered?
Which functional roles manage which sales orders, and what is the performance distribution by role?
What is the temperature compliance across all dispatch legs — are any chilled/frozen orders being dispatched in non-compliant vehicles?
What is the complete order-to-delivery journey for a given sales order, including allocation, storage, dispatch, and delivery?
Which supply-side bottlenecks from LSC-ONT are causing the most margin erosion on the demand side?
